title: New Isles
description: Unleash your inner dragon trainer in New Isles. Explore a viking world like in HTTYD, with improved farming, wield more weapons, and soar with your dragon companion through the exciting islands! Experience How to Train your Dragon like in the movies!
body:
# New Isles Modpack

Welcome to New Isles, an epic adventure that brings the world of How to Train Your Dragon to Minecraft. This modpack introduces a plethora of new features, textures, and content to enhance your gameplay.

Feel like a viking using kegs to brew new useful beers, discover a new world and register it in your atlas, find and tame new dragons, trade in a new currency system, find new epic biomes and animals in your journeys and shape your adventure!

## Key Mods:

### Farmer's Delight
- Enjoy improved farming mechanics with the "Farmer's Delight" mod. Grow a variety of crops, rear livestock, and become a master farmer in the vast landscapes of the New Isles.

### Isle of Berk
- Encounter the majestic dragons from "Isle of Berk." Form bonds with these powerful creatures and embark on thrilling adventures. Train and ride your very own dragons as you explore the world.

### Tectonic & Continents
- The "Tectonic" and "Continents" mods redefine world generation. Say hello to little islands and vast continents filled with diverse landscapes, biomes, and unique structures. Explore a truly epic world.

### Better Combat (and new weapons for it)
- Equip yourself with improved combat mechanics using Better Combat. This mod enhances your battles with tactics and combat dynamics, making every encounter a thrilling challenge.

## Modpack Features:

- Medieval-styled textures and blocks that transform your Minecraft world into an enchanting realm of dragons using mods and resource packs.
- A rich farming experience, allowing you to cultivate crops and raise animals to sustain your adventures.
- An extensive collection of dragons and dragon-themed content, inspired by the "How to Train Your Dragon" series.
- Diverse world generation with continents and structures that promise countless exploration opportunities.

Embark on a legendary journey in the New Isles, where you can immerse yourself in the world of HTTYD, engage in epic battles, and discover the wonders of a completely reimagined Minecraft experience.
